title: The Zombie Desert
lines: You stumble out onto shifting, orange sand that feels like ground bone. The sky is a bruised, eternal twilight, thick with stars that don't belong to any known constellation.
You turn around to look at the door, but there is nothing but an endless expanse of dunes. The wooden portal has been swallowed by the desert, or perhaps it never existed at all.
In the distance, you see a lone, distorted silhouette stumbling across a dune. You are no longer in the world you knew.
The air is heavy with the scent of ancient ozone. Your journey through this alien wasteland has begun.

options.desc: 1. Venture deeper into the orange sands
2. Pause and listen to the haunting desert wind
3. Dig a shallow pit in the sand to rest (Wait for night)
